name: Tax Abatement for Returned Distilled Spirits

eligibility.description: The proprietor must file a claim within 6 months of the date the spirits are returned to the bonded premises.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Provides for the abatement, credit, or refund of tax on distilled spirits that are returned to the bonded premises of a distilled spirits plant.
